refactorings_applied: Improved test robustness: replaced fragile source.split('if (!isMobile)') approach with MobileContent-anchored regex matching
Added guard test to detect parsing failures early and provide clear diagnostics
Improved JSDoc comments explaining the source-level testing approach rationale
commits: cb174b47: refactor(test): improve mobile overflow test robustness (#548)
message: Refactoring complete. Test robustness improved by replacing fragile string-splitting with MobileContent-anchored detection. No source code changes needed for the component itself -- the CSS fix was minimal and correct. All 5411 tests pass, 0 lint/type errors.
